About

Who I Am

I'm a Marketing graduate with a strong interest in digital marketing, social media content creation, branding, and campaign execution.

Throughout my academic journey and professional experiences, I have worked on marketing projects across the catering, healthcare, and public sectors. These experiences have strengthened my ability to develop marketing strategies, create engaging digital content, and support campaign objectives through creative and analytical thinking.

I enjoy combining creativity with data-driven decision making to help brands connect with their audiences more effectively.

I am proactive, adaptable and results-oriented. I believe that my ideas and synergy across teams would value add the success of your campaigns

Selected work

My Past Projects

A mix of business, organisational, and self-initiated work — covering social growth, SEO, event design, and landing pages.

Brief — HHH-001 TikTok + SEO

Hock Hoe Heng Catering

Helping a heritage catering brand show up where Gen Z and millennials actually look.

Objective
Grow brand visibility and engagement with younger audiences in Singapore, and make the website easier to use and find.
What I did
Set up and ran HHH's first TikTok account from scratch — planning, filming, and launching 6 TikTok videos with varied content concepts aimed at Gen Z and millennial audiences. Separately, audited and redesigned key pages of the company website — homepage, About Us, testimonials, and contact — improving usability, on-page SEO, and enquiry conversion.
Outcome
A new content channel reaching an audience HHH hadn't tapped before, plus a cleaner, more search-friendly website with a clearer path to enquiries.
TikTok — @hockhoeheng_catering

Brief — EASMED-002 Events + Campaigns

Easmed

Internship — visual support for company events and marketing campaigns.

Objective
Give the marketing team ready-to-use visuals for upcoming events and campaigns.
What I did
Designed digital promotional content — graphics, banners, and event collateral — for company events and marketing campaigns during my internship.
Outcome
Delivered campaign-ready visuals on schedule, supporting the team's event and campaign calendar.
Easmed — World Sleep Day promotion
Brief — SAF-003 Event Design

Singapore Armed Forces

Designing the posters that get a unit to actually read the announcement.

Objective
Promote official unit and SAF-wide events to personnel in a way people would actually stop and read.
What I did
Designed and published event posters and digital content for my unit and for official SAF events — including the Chinese New Year celebration poster shown here.
Outcome
Clear, on-brand event materials used to inform and promote unit and SAF activities.
SBN Chinese New Year poster — Engineer Cluster
SBN Green Day — beach clean-up poster
Brief — SELF-004 Landing Pages + Posters

Personal Projects

Practice reps — posters, mock-ups, and a lead-generation landing page, built on my own time.

Objective
Keep building range outside of formal work — practising creative and conversion-focused design end-to-end.
What I did
Designed posters, product mock-ups, and a lead-generation landing page concept ("The Safewatch") covering messaging, value proposition, and call-to-action design.
Outcome
A growing personal library of self-directed creative and landing page work.
The Safewatch — landing page concept
Brief — SELF-005 Video Production

BTO Key Collection Vlog

A personal video project — planned, shot, and edited entirely by me in a cinematic vlog style.

Objective
Document my sister's BTO key collection day in a meaningful and visually engaging way, going beyond a simple phone recording.
What I did
Planned the shoot, handled all filming on the day, and edited the footage into a cinematic vlog — including pacing, music selection, colour grading, and captioning. Published on YouTube as a personal creative project.
Outcome
A polished, cinematic short-form video that demonstrates end-to-end video production skills — from concept and planning through to post-production and publishing.
